lever: Specialize the dense F32 batch-axis-0 while loop with add body and lt condition into an independent per-lane state-machine path before the generic while batching fallback.

final_rebench.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-pass72-f32-while-finalbench rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_while/batched_scalar_f32_add_128 --noplot --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

alien_inputs.harvested_primitive: branchless/vector-lane state-machine specialization for a hot independent-lane loop
artifact_coding_obligations: Each lane follows the same recurrence as the scalar while: carry_0 = init_i; carry_{n+1} = carry_n + step_i while carry_n < threshold_i.
The direct path is accepted only when the recurrence surface is exactly F32 Add/Lt over scalar or rank-1 batch-axis-0 tensors.
All non-matching surfaces return None and continue through the existing generic batching implementation.

accepted_surface: Exactly three inputs: init, step, threshold.
At least one input has batch_dim Some(0), and every batched input uses batch axis 0 with matching size.
Inputs are F32 scalars, scalar F32 tensors, or rank-1 F32 tensors with F32Bits literals.
fallback_surface: Malformed tensor literals or unexpected literal widths.
isomorphism_proof.ordering: Each lane is evaluated independently in ascending batch-index order, and output element i is produced from input lane i.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each lane uses the same Rust f32 addition sequence as the scalar loop. No reassociation, reduction tree, widening, narrowing, or fused operation is introduced.
isomorphism_proof.comparison_nan: The loop condition uses partial_cmp Less; NaN produces no Less result and exits, matching the existing scalar less-than condition.
isomorphism_proof.max_iter: The direct path performs the same bounded number of body updates and returns the same while_loop exceeded max iterations error surface when iteration equals max_iter.
